scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @publication/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @publication/api build && corepack pnpm --filter @publication/admin build && corepack pnpm --filter @publication/site build
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter @publication/shared lint && corepack pnpm --filter @publication/api lint && corepack pnpm --filter @publication/admin lint && corepack pnpm --filter @publication/site lint
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @publication/api test && corepack pnpm --filter @publication/site test
scripts.submission:check: corepack pnpm lint; corepack pnpm test; corepack pnpm build; corepack pnpm e2e
